출애굽기 6:1.content: Yahweh said to Moses, “Now you shall see what I will do to Pharaoh, for by a strong hand he shall let them go, and by a strong hand he shall drive them out of his land.”

출애굽기 6:2.content: God spoke to Moses, and said to him, “I am Yahweh.

출애굽기 6:3.content: I appeared to Abraham, to Isaac, and to Jacob, as God Almighty; but by my name Yahweh I was not known to them.

출애굽기 6:4.content: I have also established my covenant with them, to give them the land of Canaan, the land of their travels, in which they lived as aliens.

출애굽기 6:5.content: Moreover I have heard the groaning of the children of Israel, whom the Egyptians keep in bondage, and I have remembered my covenant.

출애굽기 6:6.content: Therefore tell the children of Israel, ‘I am Yahweh, and I will bring you out from under the burdens of the Egyptians, and I will rid you out of their bondage, and I will redeem you with an outstretched arm, and with great judgments.

출애굽기 6:7.content: I will take you to myself for a people. I will be your God; and you shall know that I am Yahweh your God, who brings you out from under the burdens of the Egyptians.

출애굽기 6:8.content: I will bring you into the land which I swore to give to Abraham, to Isaac, and to Jacob; and I will give it to you for a heritage: I am Yahweh.’ ”

출애굽기 6:9.content: Moses spoke so to the children of Israel, but they didn’t listen to Moses for anguish of spirit, and for cruel bondage.

출애굽기 6:11.content: “Go in, speak to Pharaoh king of Egypt, that he let the children of Israel go out of his land.”

출애굽기 6:12.content: Moses spoke before Yahweh, saying, “Behold, the children of Israel haven’t listened to me. How then shall Pharaoh listen to me, when I have uncircumcised lips?”

출애굽기 6:13.content: Yahweh spoke to Moses and to Aaron, and gave them a command to the children of Israel, and to Pharaoh king of Egypt, to bring the children of Israel out of the land of Egypt.

출애굽기 6:14.content: These are the heads of their fathers’ houses. The sons of Reuben the firstborn of Israel: Hanoch, and Pallu, Hezron, and Carmi; these are the families of Reuben.

출애굽기 6:15.content: The sons of Simeon: Jemuel, and Jamin, and Ohad, and Jachin, and Zohar, and Shaul the son of a Canaanite woman; these are the families of Simeon.

출애굽기 6:16.content: These are the names of the sons of Levi according to their generations: Gershon, and Kohath, and Merari; and the years of the life of Levi were one hundred thirty-seven years.

출애굽기 6:17.content: The sons of Gershon: Libni and Shimei, according to their families.

출애굽기 6:18.content: The sons of Kohath: Amram, and Izhar, and Hebron, and Uzziel; and the years of the life of Kohath were one hundred thirty-three years.

출애굽기 6:19.content: The sons of Merari: Mahli and Mushi. These are the families of the Levites according to their generations.

출애굽기 6:20.content: Amram took Jochebed his father’s sister to himself as wife; and she bore him Aaron and Moses. The years of the life of Amram were one hundred thirty-seven years.

출애굽기 6:21.content: The sons of Izhar: Korah, and Nepheg, and Zichri.

출애굽기 6:22.content: The sons of Uzziel: Mishael, and Elzaphan, and Sithri.

출애굽기 6:23.content: Aaron took Elisheba, the daughter of Amminadab, the sister of Nahshon, as his wife; and she bore him Nadab and Abihu, Eleazar and Ithamar.

출애굽기 6:24.content: The sons of Korah: Assir, and Elkanah, and Abiasaph; these are the families of the Korahites.

출애굽기 6:25.content: Eleazar Aaron’s son took one of the daughters of Putiel as his wife; and she bore him Phinehas. These are the heads of the fathers’ houses of the Levites according to their families.

출애굽기 6:26.content: These are that Aaron and Moses to whom Yahweh said, “Bring out the children of Israel from the land of Egypt according to their armies.”

출애굽기 6:27.content: These are those who spoke to Pharaoh king of Egypt, to bring out the children of Israel from Egypt. These are that Moses and Aaron.

출애굽기 6:28.content: On the day when Yahweh spoke to Moses in the land of Egypt,

출애굽기 6:29.content: Yahweh said to Moses, “I am Yahweh. Tell Pharaoh king of Egypt all that I tell you.”

출애굽기 6:30.content: Moses said before Yahweh, “Behold, I am of uncircumcised lips, and how shall Pharaoh listen to me?”
